name: Apple
description: Crisp and sweet, apples are one of the most widely consumed fruits in the world. Rich in fiber and antioxidants, they support heart health and digestion.

name: Banana
description: A natural energy booster packed with potassium and B vitamins. Bananas are perfect pre-workout fuel and help maintain healthy blood pressure.

name: Mango
description: Known as the king of fruits, mangoes are juicy, sweet, and loaded with vitamins A and C. Great for skin health and immune support.

name: Orange
description: Famous for its high Vitamin C content, oranges boost immunity and promote healthy skin. Their natural sugars provide quick energy.

name: Pineapple
description: Tropical and tangy, pineapples contain bromelain, an enzyme that aids digestion and reduces inflammation. Great in smoothies and salads.

name: Strawberry
description: Bright red and naturally sweet, strawberries are packed with antioxidants and Vitamin C. They support heart health and help manage blood sugar.

name: Watermelon
description: With 92% water content, watermelon is incredibly hydrating. It contains lycopene, a powerful antioxidant linked to heart health.

name: Papaya
description: Papaya is rich in digestive enzymes and vitamins. Its anti-inflammatory properties and fiber content make it excellent for gut health.

name: Grapes
description: Grapes are rich in resveratrol, a powerful antioxidant that promotes heart health. Both red and green varieties offer unique nutritional benefits.

name: Avocado
description: A nutrient-dense superfood loaded with healthy monounsaturated fats. Avocados support brain health, heart function, and nutrient absorption.

name: Carrot
description: Carrots are famous for their beta-carotene content which the body converts to Vitamin A. They support eye health and immune function.

name: Broccoli
description: One of the most nutrient-dense vegetables, broccoli is packed with fiber, vitamins, and cancer-fighting compounds called glucosinolates.

name: Tomato
description: Tomatoes are rich in lycopene, an antioxidant associated with reduced risk of heart disease. They are versatile in cooking and delicious raw.

name: Lettuce
description: Crisp and refreshing, lettuce is a salad staple with a high water content and essential vitamins. It supports bone health through its Vitamin K.

name: Bell Pepper
description: Bell peppers contain more Vitamin C than oranges and come in red, yellow, and green varieties. They are crunchy, sweet, and great raw or cooked.

name: Cucumber
description: Cucumbers are 95% water, making them extremely hydrating. They are low in calories and contain antioxidants that reduce inflammation.

name: Spinach
description: A powerhouse leafy green, spinach is loaded with iron, calcium, and vitamins. It supports muscle function, bone health, and eye health.

name: Onion
description: Onions are a fundamental cooking ingredient with powerful antioxidant properties. They contain quercetin which reduces inflammation and supports immunity.

name: Garlic
description: Used medicinally for thousands of years, garlic has potent antibacterial and antiviral properties. Allicin in garlic supports heart health and immunity.

name: Zucchini
description: Low in calories and high in nutrients, zucchini is a versatile summer squash. It is rich in antioxidants and supports healthy digestion.
